properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2 v5 v2 v6 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I’ve heard of Moses crossing The mighty red sea And I’ve heard of Joshua leading Israel to victory But in this day I’m looking for Present tense reality I’m looking for the literal life of Christ To form in me

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: In the resurrection of the Bride We can hear the thunders sounding The pull is deep inside And I am hearing Him call my name So I’m looking for the quickening power For the rapture and the change

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: We’ve heard of Jephthah and Gideon Of David’s mighty men And we’ve heard of the power of Samson When that spirit came on to him So today we are looking for The third pull on display When the mind of Christ is in the Bride she’ll say

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: We know Bro. Willie and Wilson Bro. Leon too And Bro. John and Frankie Jacobs Saints who stood tested tried and true Sleeping saints and over comers Victorious in this age And in the better resurrection They’ll be raised

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: This pull brought us out from Moab And from gleaning in the field Where we met with the Lord of harvest Whom His chief reaper has revealed And now is the time of purging We’re on that threshing floor We’re being cleansed and sealed to sin no more The token is what we’re longing for The end time Words come back to seed The little Gentile Bride, she must conceive For a blast of thunders and a prophet’s shout Its full redemption will bring us out From the field of gleaning Into God’s house

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Third pull power and authority I want my body change And theophany Oh yes, the sleeping saints will rise And the Bride will take her flight When the resurrection power is formed in me
